name: Spring Onions on Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Use six or seven finger-sized onions per serving.
2. Trim off the green tops from each onion.
3. Cook the onions in lightly salted boiling water until tender. This should take about 20 minutes for fresh, young onions.
4. Drain the onions and add more salt if needed.
5. Season with melted butter.
6. Toast slices of bread.
7. Arrange the onions on the toast, similar to asparagus on toast.
8. Serve immediately.
